violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the basement, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2025
Gasket on 6 stack cooler was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

Food contact surfaces of slicer was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was cleaned and sanitized at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2024

Insect carcasses (cockroaches) were observed on glue traps in dietary storage area. Deceased pests must be removed at a frequency to prevent attractants for other pests. PIC informed to remove. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator door gaskets, interior of the 2 door reach in, and fixture used to hang utensils have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Chest freezer was observed with ice accumulation. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The following was observed in poor repair, -Coving under 3-bay sink -Caulking at kitchen hand sink Physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024
